description:
NARVIC - Blue Leather Shoulder Bag

rnAdventure and new experience sometimes are all you need.. Last time I've checked, travelling offers both. For your journeys choose the bag that you need! When there's snow, a suede blue leather shoulder bag is the right choice cause it's all about the warmth you get from the texture and the rich colouration.rnrnThis blue suede leather epitomises warmth that we need when we walk into the city's streets in winter. Blue is always rich, and in suede leather, it's even richer!rnrnBlue Leather Shoulder Bag is a must. So we wanted one bag in blue cause it is such an easy colour. It teams perfectly with absolutely everything, and you can keep it everywhere with no limitations at all.rnrnWe used suede leather cause we always love the smoothness of the touch.rnWe always pay attention to minimalism. Suede leather is of exceptional quality, so we didn't feel to add anything else.rnrnSome styling ideas... Deep blue teams perfectly with grey, white, and pastel pink.rnrnDetailsrnrn‣Genuine leatherrn‣H:24cm x L:35cm x W:16,5cmrn‣Adjustable shoulder straprn‣No lining insidern‣This item is made to order onlyrnrnAll the bags are designed and handcrafted mainly with love, care and the need for expressing a piece of ourselves.

title: PENZA - Black Leather Tote Bag
short_description: Made of pure, genuine, soft leather in black colour.rnrnClean cuts and knitted leather around the edges of the bag compose a great result.rnrnDetails:rnrn‣Genuine leatherrn‣H:32cm x L:40cm x W:6,5 cmrn‣Includea one pocket insidern‣One key looprn‣No lining insidern‣This item is made to order onlyrnrnThere is a similar option herernrnAll the bags are designed and handcrafted mainly with love, care and the need of expressing a piece of ourselves.rnrnReady to ship in 10 business days.
description:
PENZA - Black Leather Tote Bag

rnMade by pure, genuine, black leather with a shape that makes this tote bag very elegant and classy. You can team this tote bag with every outfit and with every situation, from a business meeting in the office to a relaxing walk into the city's streets. This Black Leather Tote Bag will become an all-day choice. That's the reason we used black leather because with black you have seriously no limitations.rnrnApart from the colour, we chose a very soft and light type of leather because we didn't want the bag to be heavy. Something beneficial especially if you are about to keep it from day to night. It is spacious enough so that you can fill it with all your necessities, such as A4 paper or a small laptop (13 inches).rnrnInside there is a leather case as an efficient solution to keep the inner part of the bag tidy and organised. In this case, you can put your pen, your phone, and a small notebook. On the opposite side, there's a key loop.rnrnDetails:rnrn‣Genuine leatherrn‣H:32cm x L:40cm x W:6,5 cmrn‣Leather casern‣One key looprn‣No lining insidern‣This item is made to order onlyrnrnAll the bags are designed and handcrafted mainly with love, care and the need for expressing a piece of ourselves.

title: MORELIA - Brown Leather Tote Bag
short_description: Made of pure, genuine, leather in brown colour. A kind of leather that seems like used.rnrnClean cuts and knitted leather around the edges of the bag compose a great result.rnrnDetails:rnrn‣Genuine leatherrn‣H:31cm x L:41cm W:18cmrn‣One key looprn‣Includes one pocket insidern‣No lining insidern‣This item is made to order onlyrnrnAll the bags are designed and handcrafted mainly with love, care and the need for expressing a piece of ourselves.rnrnReady to ship in 10 business days.
description: We searched a lot to find this type of leather, for this unique Brown Leather Tote Bag. I wanted something different than the rest. A kind of leather that seems like used. So it was an instant crash.rnrnThis brown tote bag has the right colouration of brown. It gives the impression of something vintage, something retro. It feels like a bag from another decade, a bag that has some history behind. Something like heritage. So we formed this leather to something exactly like that: a classy, elegant tote bag which has always been a must for women.rnrnMinimalism is another vital factor for me as a designer. This brown leather tote bag reflects the minimalism that we love. We always pay attention to details though. That's why in the inside there is a leather case and a key loop as an efficient solution to keeping the inner part of the bag tidy and organised.rnrnSome styling tips: keep this brown tote everywhere and with everything. It's combined perfectly with your knitwear, your light parkas, and your heavy coats.rnrnDetails:rnrn‣Genuine leatherrn‣H:31cm x L:41cm W:18cmrn‣One key looprn‣Includes one pocket insidern‣No lining insidern‣This item is made to order onlyrnrnAll the bags are designed and handcrafted mainly with love, care and the need for expressing a piece of ourselves.

ROSTOCK

title: LUBLIN - Black Leather Backpack/ 3in1 Leather Bag
short_description: Made of pure, genuine leather in black colour.rnrnThis versatile black leather 3-in-1 bag is a game-changer, offering you the option to easily switch between three different styles – backpack, cross-body, and shoulder bag – simply by rearranging its straps. With this bag, you’ll have everything you need to complete your look, no matter the occasion.rnrnDetails:rnrn‣Genuine leatherrn‣H:32cm x L:23cm x D:14cmrn‣One key looprn‣Adjustable shoulder strapsrn‣No lining insidern‣This item is made to order onlyrnrnAll the bags are designed and handcrafted mainly with love, care and the need for expressing a piece of ourselves.rnrnReady to ship in 10 business days.
description: Women love versatility, comfort, and stylish items. That’s what this black leather backpack/3in1 Leather Bag is all about.rnrnFirst of all, Versatility which is so important if you want one bag for every kind of occasion. One bag that can be transformed into three different bags only by changing and rearranging straps. So now you have a backpack, a cross-body bag and a shoulder bag, all three styles in just one sack.rnrnThe second main parameter is Comfort which is a huge characteristic of Hylinda. Comfort is gained generally by its space and yet its minimal design. That’s a bag suitable for every occasion, either you want to combine it with a suit to your office or with a relaxed outfit to a walk into the city’s streets.rnrnThe third important feature is Style. Women love style and fashion, and so does Hylinda.rnrnA bag that its design is minimal yet impressive, with beautiful cuts and shape, metallic details and very elegant straps.rnrnDetails:rnrn‣Genuine leatherrn‣H:32cm x L:23cm x D:14cmrn‣One key looprn‣Adjustable shoulder strapsrn‣No lining insidern‣This item is made to order onlyrnrnAll the bags are designed and handcrafted mainly with love, care and the need for expressing a piece of ourselves.

BLACK VOVOUSA - Dual Leather Camera Straps

rnWe know that photographers are willing to do everything to get their perfect shot! They know what they want, and they do not compromise with anything less. So, have you ever thought that you could work with two cameras functionally and comfortably? These Dual Leather Camera Straps are the perfect choice for those who know what they want!rnrnThey are stylish, comfortable and most of all it will help you tell your story through your captions.rnrnWith these Hylinda's details, you will get the perfect shots and at the same time stay focused no matter where you are.rnrnIt's the storytelling of the photograph that matters, and we are sure that most of the photographers know it for sure.rnrnThere is also a brown choice  herernrnDetails :rn

title: Small Black MONTPELLIER - Leather Moleskine Cover
short_description: This leather Moleskine Cover is the minimal choice to protect your valuable notes. Made from the most exceptional quality genuine leather will last for years. It comes with a Moleskine notebook so that you can replace it in the future with a new one!rnrnThe Moleskine Cahiers are journals with a flexible heavy-duty cardboard cover in red with visible stitching on the spine. The last 16 sheets are detachable, and there is a pocket for loose notes.rnrnThe paper is acid-free, and the pages are plain.rnrnDetails:rn‣Genuine leatherrn‣H: 16 cm x L: 10 cmrn‣Fits one small Moleskine notebookrn‣One Moleskine notebook is including in the boxrn‣Acid free paperrn‣Plain pagesrn‣This item is made to order onlyrnrnThere is a brown choice herernrnThere is a beige choice herernrnThere is a pastel pink choice herernrnReady to ship in 2-4 business days.

description:
Leather Cross-body bags have always been a huge must for women. Especially for those who love the combination of style and comfort. These two basic parameters that are taken into serious consideration for every Hylinda Leather item.rnrnMade of pure, genuine, soft leather in khaki colour this bag is the perfect choice for women who want to be in fashion but also who want to have a comfortable, basic bag for their everyday outfits.rnrnThe minimal shape of this bag is what makes it an essential item for every woman’s wardrobe, a minimal bag that can safely complete every outfit.rnrnDetails:rnrn‣Genuine leatherrn‣H: 15,5 cm x L: 18 cm x W:2,5 cmrn‣ Adjustable Straprn‣No lining insidern‣This item is made to order onlyrn
